articles.title: US Treasury chief says 15% global tariff likely implemented this week
articles.content: Asked when the hike will be implemented, Bessent told CNBC: "That's likely sometime this week.". During this five-month window, the Trump administration will move to wrap up investigations linked to concerns over national...
